metadata.title: 9th Pass Debug Factorial — SAM3 BS=1 + Zero-Shot Focus
metadata.priority: P0 — SAM3 OOM is the ONLY blocker for completing the factorial
metadata.estimated-cost: ~$3-5 GCP L4 spot (18 new jobs + controller)

root-causes.cause: MLflow HTTP 413 — large artifacts rejected (32 MB limit)
SAM3 TopoLoRA/Hybrid OOM on L4 at batch_size=2 — 21.92/24 GB VRAM
Calibration metrics .numpy() crash on MONAI MetaTensor
MLflow auth env vars in SkyPilot YAML (cosmetic warnings)

fixes-applied.fix: GRAD_ACCUM_STEPS env var wired through run_factorial.sh → train_flow.py → trainer
Gradient accumulation in SegmentationTrainer.train_epoch() — loss scaling, optimizer step every N iters
OOM detection with structured diagnostics (model_family, batch_size, VRAM, suggestion)
Model profiles updated with measured VRAM data (sam3_topolora: 13 GB @ BS=1)
Calibration MetaTensor .numpy() crash fixed (commit a6b7cc9, 8th pass)
MLflow auth env vars removed from train_factorial.yaml (commit eab5604, 8th pass)

qa-improvements-since-prior-pass.improvement: 18 factorial model_overrides config tests (SAM3 BS=1, accum=4 consistency)
8 gradient accumulation unit tests (step counting, loss scaling, incomplete groups)
4 MONAI integration tests for gradient accumulation
7 OOM detection tests (PyTorch 2.x + legacy, re-raise guarantee)
13 model profile VRAM data tests (measured values across 4 model families)
14 VRAM estimator tests (budget check, scaling, extrapolation)
Eliminated 2 xfails (ports localhost binding + GRAD_ACCUM_STEPS env fallback)
Prod test suite: 6514 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped, 0 xfailed (TRUE ZERO)

pre-launch-qa.gate: 32 training + 2 zero-shot = 34 conditions, SAM3 shows BS=1/accum=4
8th pass root causes + fixes documented above

factor.name: method
factor.levels: none, swag (iterated inside each GPU job)

factorial-design.summary:
4 models x 4 losses x 2 aux_calib = 32 training GPU jobs x 1 fold + 2 zero-shot baselines = 34 total conditions Debug: 2 epochs, 23 train / 12 val volumes
9TH PASS FOCUS: --resume will skip 16 SUCCEEDED (DynUNet + MambaVesselNet). New launches: 16 SAM3 (8 TopoLoRA + 8 Hybrid) at BS=1/accum=4 + 2 zero-shot. Expected new jobs: 18.
Model overrides (VRAM safety): sam3_topolora: BS=1, accum=4 (effective BS=4, ~13 GB VRAM) sam3_hybrid: BS=1, accum=4 (effective BS=4, ~7.2 GB VRAM) sam3_vanilla: BS=1, accum=1 (zero-shot, ~3.5 GB VRAM)

phases.phase: Poll sky jobs queue, update report every state change
If failures: aggregate by root cause (OOM? preemption? Docker?)

watchlist.item: GPUS_ALL_REGIONS=1 forces serial execution — all 18 jobs queue sequentially
SAM3 TopoLoRA VRAM at BS=1 — expected ~13 GB on L4 (24 GB), first real test
Gradient accumulation correctness — first cloud run with accum=4, verify loss curves match BS=2 behavior
MLflow HTTP 413 for large artifacts — GCS mount_cached workaround in place, not root-fixed
SWAG post-training timing — untested for SAM3 models, may OOM separately
SAM3 Hybrid VRAM at BS=1 — expected ~7.2 GB, should be fine but first cloud test
Spot preemption recovery — working in 8th pass, verify for longer SAM3 jobs
Zero-shot baselines — sam3_vanilla + vesselfm, first launch from run_factorial.sh

success-criteria.criterion: SAM3 TopoLoRA VRAM stays below 16 GB at BS=1
Gradient accumulation produces comparable loss curves to BS=2

focus-areas.area: Verify gradient accumulation correctness on cloud GPU (AMP + GradScaler)
Collect measured VRAM for SAM3 at BS=1 (update model profiles)
Validate zero-shot launch path in run_factorial.sh
Document SAM3 training time per epoch on L4 (for paper cost table)

cloud-test-upgrade.current-state: 80+ new tests added this session for gradient accumulation + VRAM + OOM
cloud-test-upgrade.target-state: Add cloud-observation tests based on 9th pass results

test-group.name: gradient-accumulation-cloud
test-group.test: Verify effective_batch_size logged to MLflow params for SAM3 runs
Verify loss curve slope comparable between BS=1/accum=4 and BS=2/accum=1

test-group.name: vram-measurement
test-group.test: Verify vram/peak_mb MLflow metric for SAM3 TopoLoRA < 16 GB
Update model_profiles with real measured SAM3 BS=1 VRAM from cloud

test-group.name: zero-shot-baselines
test-group.test: Verify sam3_vanilla frozen_encoder_eval produces non-zero metrics
Verify vesselfm zero_shot_only on DeepVess produces non-zero metrics
